subject: [FYI] Payment Received - {{FULL_NAME}}

body:
FYI: Application Approved - Final Status

This application has received final board approval. The applicant has been sent payment instructions and will now submit their membership dues.

APPLICANT INFORMATION:
Name: {{FULL_NAME}}
Membership Level: {{MEMBERSHIP_LEVEL}}
Household Type: {{HOUSEHOLD_TYPE}}
Application ID: {{APPLICATION_ID}}
Board Final Approval Date: {{BOARD_APPROVAL_DATE}}

APPROVAL STATUS:
Initial Board Review: APPROVED ✓
RSO Security Review: APPROVED ✓
Final Board Review: APPROVED ✓

PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS SENT:
Dues Amount: ${{DUES_USD}} USD / P{{DUES_BWP}} BWP
Payment Reference: {{PAYMENT_REFERENCE}}
Methods: Bank transfer (SDFCU, ABSA), PayPal, Zelle, Cash

NEXT STEPS:
1. Applicant submits payment proof (receipt/screenshot)
2. Treasurer verifies payment
3. Membership activated upon verification

No action is required from board members at this time.

GEA System

subject: [FYI] Payment Verified - Member Activated - {{FULL_NAME}}
